context: Tests whether the agent generates tasks.md following IIKit's strict task format: sequential T-prefixed IDs, [P] markers only for parallelizable tasks, [USn] labels only for user story tasks, comma-separated TS-XXX references (not prose ranges), and the correct phase structure (Setup, Foundational, User Stories, Polish).

checklist.name: Sequential T-prefixed IDs
checklist.description: All tasks have sequential IDs in the format T001, T002, T003... (three-digit zero-padded numbers with T prefix)

checklist.name: [P] marker usage
checklist.description: Tasks that work on different files with no mutual dependencies are marked [P], and tasks with dependencies or shared file access are NOT marked [P]

checklist.name: [USn] label on story tasks
checklist.description: Tasks that implement user story functionality include a [US1], [US2], or [US3] label, while Setup and Foundational tasks do NOT include a [USn] label

checklist.name: Comma-separated TS references
checklist.description: When multiple test spec IDs are referenced, they are listed as a comma-separated list (e.g., [TS-001, TS-002]) NOT as prose ranges like 'TS-001 through TS-002'

checklist.name: Phase 1 Setup section
checklist.description: tasks.md contains a Phase 1 (or equivalent) section for project initialization/setup tasks (e.g., project structure, pyproject.toml, database setup)

checklist.name: Phase 2 Foundational section
checklist.description: tasks.md contains a Phase 2 (or equivalent) Foundational section for shared prerequisites that must complete before user story tasks (e.g., base models, database connection)

checklist.name: User Story phases ordered by priority
checklist.description: US-1 (P1) and US-2 (P1) tasks appear in earlier phases than US-3 (P2) tasks, reflecting priority ordering from the spec

checklist.name: File paths in descriptions
checklist.description: Task descriptions include specific file paths (e.g., 'src/models/item.py', 'tests/step_definitions/') rather than vague descriptions without paths

checklist.name: Checkbox format
checklist.description: All tasks use the markdown checkbox format `- [ ]` (with space inside the brackets)

checklist.name: Polish/Final phase
checklist.description: tasks.md contains a final Polish or Cross-Cutting Concerns phase for integration testing, documentation, or cleanup tasks
